summary: Tested 3 new features: Sonner toasts, Chat with polling, Account page. All 12 test cases passed with 2 minor issues noted.

minor.issue: Returns 400 Bad Request when sending chat message. Optimistic update still works client-side but message may not persist in backend.

ui_bugs.issue: Email shown twice - displayName falls back to user.email (no first/last name), then email shown again as subtitle. Shows 'admin@test.com / admin@test.com'.

integration_issues.issue: When navigating to /account via full page reload (e.g. direct URL, page.goto), auth hydration race condition causes redirect to /login even with valid token. In-app navigation (clicking User icon link) works correctly. Root cause: account/page.tsx useEffect fires before AuthInit useEffect finishes /api/auth/me call.

test_results.test_1_toast_productcard: PASS - Toast 'Ajouté au panier ! Casque Bluetooth Sans Fil Pro' appears bottom-right
test_results.test_2_toast_product_page: PASS - Toast appears on /product/p1 add to cart
test_results.test_3_chat_not_logged_in: PASS - Shows 'Connectez-vous pour discuter' with 'Se connecter' button
test_results.test_4_chat_logged_in: PASS - Chat interface with sidebar 'Support bieli.' and messages area
test_results.test_5_chat_send_message: PASS - Optimistic update (black bubble right side) works. Backend returns 400 but UI still works.
test_results.test_6_chat_polling_badge: PASS - Sidebar shows '1 message' count. No CORS errors in console.
test_results.test_7_account_not_logged_in: PASS - /account redirects to /login when not authenticated
test_results.test_8_account_logged_in: PASS - Shows initials (A), email, role badge 'ADMIN', Mes commandes section
test_results.test_9_account_no_orders: PASS - 'Aucune commande' with Package icon and 'Découvrir la boutique' link
test_results.test_10_account_logout: PASS - Logout redirects to /login and clears bieli_token from localStorage
test_results.test_11_header_user_icon_link: PASS - User icon is <a> tag with href=/account
test_results.test_12_login_no_error_toast: PASS - No error toast shown on successful login

action_items: Fix /api/messages/send returning 400 - investigate API request payload or auth issues
Consider fixing account page auth hydration race condition: add isLoading check before redirecting in account/page.tsx useEffect (if !mounted || isLoading) rather than just (!mounted)
Minor: Fix profile card showing email twice when user has no first/last name
critical_code_review_comments: account/page.tsx race condition: the redirect to /login triggers based on isAuthenticated BEFORE AuthInit has finished calling /api/auth/me. Fix: also check isLoading from authStore before redirecting. e.g: if (!isAuthenticated && !isLoading) { router.replace('/login') }
/api/messages/send returns 400 - could be the receiver_id:null field is not accepted by backend, needs investigation
Profile card shows email as displayName and subtitle when user has no first_name/last_name - minor UX duplication
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features (toast, chat, account) work. Known issues: (1) /api/messages/send returns 400 but optimistic update still works; (2) Account page race condition on direct URL navigation - works via in-app Link click. Test credentials: admin@test.com / 123456. Catalog uses MOCKED mock data (9 French products).
